asciichat_mdns_discovery_t(3) Library Functions Manual asciichat_mdns_discovery_t(3)

NAME

asciichat_mdns_discovery_t - Discovered service information.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/mdns/mdns.h>

Data Fields


char name [256]
char type [256]
char host [256]
uint16_t port
char ipv4 [16]
char ipv6 [46]
char txt [512]
uint32_t ttl

Detailed Description

Discovered service information.

Definition at line 82 of file network/mdns/mdns.h.
